landing.tagline: Take a picture. Attach a message. Store it forever.
landing.heroTitle: A Digital Message in a Bottle
landing.heroDescription: With TagMyThing, you can snap a photo, write a message, and preserve it forever — public or private. Later, you can even pass it on to someone else.
landing.howItWorksDescription: You don't need to overthink it. Just snap, write, and tag — and it's there forever.
landing.snapAndTagDescription: Capture any object or moment. Attach your message. Save it permanently.
landing.yourMessageDescription: Write anything — a note, a memory, a warning, or a whisper to the future.
landing.passItOnDescription: Optionally transfer your tag to someone else, now or later — even after death.
landing.builtOnPermawebDescription: Stored forever on Arweave — no subscriptions, no deletion, no expiration.
landing.ctaDescription: Create your first tag today. Store your message in a bottle — digitally and permanently.

footer.brandDescription: Secure, tag, and manage your digital and physical assets with blockchain technology. Your digital legacy, protected forever.
footer.gdprDescription: We are committed to protecting your privacy and complying with GDPR regulations. Read our Privacy Policy to learn how we handle your data.

aboutUs.pageSubtitle: Our story, vision, and commitment to digital asset management

founder.title: Our Visionary Founder
founder.description: TagMyThing was envisioned and created by Marshall Epie, a passionate developer and visionary. The concept for TagMyThing dates back to 2018 when Marshall recognized the need for a secure and immutable way to safeguard important digital information, especially for those involved in the early days of cryptocurrency. Many people lost access to their digital assets simply because they misplaced their private keys. This sparked the idea for what was originally called 'Immortal AI,' a tool designed to help people keep their valuable information safe forever.

evolution.title: From Idea to Reality
evolution.description: Although the idea was ahead of its time, the technology and tools available back then weren't quite user-friendly enough to bring the vision to life. So, Marshall kept the project on the back burner until recently, when he gained new skills in prompt engineering and appeared on television in Cameroon. This inspired him to fully realize the TagMyThing platform, now backed by modern tools and a refined development process.

mediaAppearance.title: Media Appearance
mediaAppearance.description: Marshall's television appearance in Cameroon marked a turning point, providing the inspiration and confidence to transform the long-held vision into the comprehensive platform you see today.

evolution.today: Today, TagMyThing stands as a testament to Marshall's dedication to creating a fair and community-driven platform. The project is designed to be open-source and will be governed by a Decentralized Autonomous Organization (DAO), ensuring transparency and community involvement in its growth.

2018.title: 2018 - The Original Vision
2018.description: Marshall Epie conceived 'Immortal AI' after witnessing cryptocurrency users lose access to their digital assets due to misplaced private keys. The need for secure, permanent digital safekeeping became clear.

development.title: 2018-2024 - Development & Learning
development.description: The project remained in development as Marshall honed his skills in modern web development, prompt engineering, and gained valuable experience in creating user-friendly applications.

tv.title: 2024 - Television Appearance & Inspiration
tv.description: Marshall's appearance on television in Cameroon provided the final inspiration needed to bring TagMyThing to life with modern technology and refined user experience.

launch.title: 2025 - TagMyThing Launch
launch.description: The platform officially launches with comprehensive features including asset tagging, Next-of-Kin planning, business verification, and a token-based economy, all governed by community-driven DAO principles.

connect.title: Connect with Marshall Epie
connect.description: For more information about Marshall Epie and his work, or to get in touch with the TagMyThing team, use any of the following contact methods:

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.subtitle: Your privacy and data protection are our top priorities
privacyPolicy.introduction: Welcome to TagMyThing ("we," "us," "our"). We are committed to protecting your privacy and handling your personal data transparently. This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, and protect your personal data when you use our website and services.
privacyPolicy.personalIdentifiers: Personal identifiers (e.g., name, email address, phone number)
privacyPolicy.usageData: Usage data (e.g., IP address, device information, browsing behavior)
privacyPolicy.legalBasisDesc: We process your personal data under the following bases:
privacyPolicy.contractPerformance: Contract performance: to provide our services
privacyPolicy.legitimateInterests: Legitimate interests: improving our services and security
privacyPolicy.operatePlatform: To operate and maintain the platform
privacyPolicy.communicateUsers: To communicate with you (service emails, updates)
privacyPolicy.dataSharingDesc: We may share your data with:
privacyPolicy.otherUsers: Other users as necessary to perform the service (e.g., sharing tagged content with recipients)
privacyPolicy.internationalTransfersDesc: If your data is transferred outside the EEA, we ensure appropriate safeguards (such as Standard Contractual Clauses).
privacyPolicy.dataRetentionDesc: We retain your data as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described and comply with laws.
privacyPolicy.yourRightsDesc: Under GDPR, you have the right to:
privacyPolicy.lodgeComplaint: Lodge a complaint with your Data Protection Authority
privacyPolicy.securityDesc: We implement technical and organizational measures to protect your data.
privacyPolicy.contactDesc: For privacy-related questions or to exercise your rights:

gdpr.title: GDPR Compliance Statement
gdpr.subtitle: Our commitment to European Union General Data Protection Regulation compliance

introduction.title: Full GDPR Compliance Commitment
introduction.description: TagMyThing is committed to full compliance with the European Union General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). We ensure that your personal data is processed lawfully, fairly, and transparently at all times.

dataMinimization.title: Data Minimization
dataMinimization.description: We collect only the data necessary to provide and improve our services.
dataMinimization.details: Our data collection is limited to essential information required for account creation, service delivery, and platform improvement.

transparentUse.title: Transparent Use
transparentUse.description: We inform users clearly about how their data is used.
transparentUse.details: Our Privacy Policy provides comprehensive details about data collection, processing, and usage in plain language.

userRights.title: User Rights
userRights.description: You can request access to, correction of, deletion of, or export of your data at any time.
userRights.details: We provide easy mechanisms for users to exercise all GDPR rights including data portability and the right to be forgotten.

dataSecurity.title: Data Security
dataSecurity.description: We store personal data securely using trusted third-party providers.
dataSecurity.details: All data is encrypted in transit and at rest using industry-standard security measures.

supabase.name: Supabase
supabase.compliance: Fully GDPR compliant with enterprise-grade encryption and security

stripe.name: Stripe
stripe.compliance: PCI DSS certified and adheres to GDPR requirements

dataProcessingAgreements.title: Data Processing Agreements
dataProcessingAgreements.description: We have Data Processing Agreements in place with all our sub-processors, including Supabase and Stripe, to ensure lawful processing and cross-border data transfers where applicable.

accountability.title: Accountability
accountability.description: We regularly review and update our practices to remain compliant with applicable data protection laws.

regularAudits.title: Regular Audits
regularAudits.description: We conduct regular compliance audits and security assessments to ensure ongoing GDPR compliance.

staffTraining.title: Staff Training
staffTraining.description: Our team receives regular training on data protection principles and GDPR requirements.

contact.title: Contact Our Data Protection Officer
contact.description: If you have questions about GDPR compliance or wish to exercise your data protection rights, please contact us.
contact.responseTime: We will respond to all GDPR requests within 30 days as required by law.

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.subtitle: How we use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience

introduction.title: What are Cookies?
introduction.description: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help us recognize your browser, remember your preferences, and improve your experience with TagMyThing.

essential.title: Essential Cookies
essential.description: Necessary for the platform to function (e.g., authentication, security).

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
analytics.description: Help us understand usage patterns and improve the service (e.g., Google Analytics).

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Cookies
thirdParty.description: Stripe and Supabase may set cookies for secure payments and session management.

consentBanner.title: Cookie Consent Banner
consentBanner.description: When you first visit our site, you will be presented with a cookie consent banner where you can choose your preferences.

acceptAll.title: Accept All Cookies
acceptAll.description: Allow all cookies for the best experience

customize.title: Customize Preferences
customize.description: Choose which types of cookies to allow

declineNonEssential.title: Decline Non-Essential
declineNonEssential.description: Only allow essential cookies for basic functionality

browserSettings.title: Browser Settings
browserSettings.description: Manage or delete cookies in your browser

browserInstructions.title: Browser-Specific Instructions
browserInstructions.description: You can also manage cookies directly in your browser settings. Here are quick links for popular browsers:

thirdPartyServices.title: Third-Party Services
thirdPartyServices.description: We use trusted third-party services that may set their own cookies:

googleAnalytics.name: Google Analytics
googleAnalytics.optOut: You can opt out using Google's opt-out tool

stripe.name: Stripe
stripe.purpose: Secure payment processing and fraud prevention

contact.title: Questions About Cookies?
contact.description: If you have questions about our cookie policy or need help managing your preferences, please contact us.

cookiePolicy.disablingNote: Disabling certain cookies may affect the functionality of TagMyThing. Essential cookies are required for the platform to work properly.

policyChanges.title: Changes to This Policy
policyChanges.description: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or for other operational, legal, or regulatory reasons. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated 'Last updated' date.

dpa.title: Data Processing Agreement
dpa.subtitle: Legal framework for personal data processing between TagMyThing and our customers

introduction.title: Data Processing Agreement (DPA)
introduction.description: This Data Processing Agreement is entered into between TagMyThing (Processor) and You (the Customer/Controller) and governs the processing of personal data in connection with the services provided by TagMyThing.

subjectDuration.title: 1. Subject Matter & Duration
subjectDuration.content: This Agreement governs the processing of personal data for the duration of the Customer's use of TagMyThing services.

naturePurpose.title: 2. Nature & Purpose of Processing
naturePurpose.content: Processing includes collection, storage, transmission, and deletion of personal data for the purpose of delivering TagMyThing's tagging, storage, and sharing services.

dataSubjects.title: 3. Categories of Data Subjects
list: Individuals whose data may appear in uploaded content

subProcessors.title: 5. Sub-Processors
subProcessors.content: The Customer authorizes TagMyThing to use the following sub-processors:
subProcessors.note: Other sub-processors as necessary, provided that TagMyThing maintains equivalent data protection obligations.

controllerObligations.title: 6. Controller Obligations
controllerObligations.content: The Customer ensures that they have all necessary consents and legal bases to process personal data using TagMyThing.

processorObligations.title: 7. Processor Obligations
list: Process data only on documented instructions
Assist the Customer in fulfilling data subject rights
Notify the Customer of any data breaches without undue delay
Allow audits or provide documentation to demonstrate compliance

securityMeasures.title: 8. Security Measures
securityMeasures.content: TagMyThing implements appropriate technical and organizational measures, including encryption, access controls, and data backup procedures.

dataTransfers.title: 9. Data Transfers
dataTransfers.content: If personal data is transferred outside the EEA, TagMyThing ensures compliance through Standard Contractual Clauses or equivalent mechanisms.

termination.title: 10. Termination
termination.content: Upon termination, TagMyThing will delete or return personal data unless otherwise required by law.

contact.title: DPA Questions & Legal Notices
contact.description: For questions about this Data Processing Agreement or to request additional legal documentation, please contact our legal team.
contact.responseNote: We will respond to all legal inquiries within 5 business days.

dao.title: TagMyThing DAO
dao.subtitle: Community-driven governance for the future of digital asset management

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: TagMyThing is evolving into a community-driven ecosystem where users not only tag and secure their assets but also help guide the growth and governance of the platform. The DAO ensures transparency, fairness, and shared ownership in the project's future.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: All decisions, token flows, and governance actions are public and verifiable.

communityEmpowerment.title: Community Empowerment
communityEmpowerment.description: Token holders shape the future by voting on proposals and priorities.

fairDistribution.title: Fair Distribution
fairDistribution.description: Tokens reflect both participation and contribution, ensuring everyone has a stake.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.description: Resources are allocated with long-term project health in mind.

tokenUtility.title: Token Utility
tokenUtility.description: The TMT token is at the heart of the DAO. It powers:

votingRights.description: Each token represents a vote in governance decisions.

facilitators.title: Facilitators/Admins

careers.title: Join the TagMyThing Inner Circle
careers.subtitle: Shape the future of decentralized digital asset management

introduction.title: We're Building a Decentralized Future
introduction.description: At TagMyThing, we're building a community-driven, decentralized future. We're not just looking for team members—we're looking for leaders who want to help shape the project.

availablePositions.title: Available Positions
availablePositions.subtitle: We have several key roles open for enthusiastic contributors:

governanceLead.title: Governance Lead
governanceLead.description: Guide the community in decision-making and help shape the DAO's direction.

operationsLead.title: Operations Lead
operationsLead.description: Oversee daily operations and ensure everything runs smoothly.

developmentLead.title: Development Lead
developmentLead.description: Take charge of the codebase, coordinate with other developers, and bring new features to life.

communityLead.title: Community Lead
communityLead.description: Foster a welcoming and engaging environment for all participants.

marketingLead.title: Marketing Lead
marketingLead.description: Spread the word and grow our reach through creative campaigns and content.

designLead.title: Design Lead
designLead.description: Ensure our platform is beautiful, intuitive, and user-friendly.

securityLead.title: Security & Compliance Lead
securityLead.description: Help us maintain a secure and compliant environment.

howToApply.title: How to Apply
howToApply.description: We believe in flexibility and open collaboration. If you're interested in leading any of these areas, email us at tagmythingrecruitment@marshallepie.com. Let us know which role you're applying for, share a bit about your background, and tell us what kind of compensation or arrangement would work best for you.

philosophy.title: Our Philosophy
philosophy.description: We want to create a fair and collaborative space, so this is your chance to help define how you contribute and how you're rewarded. Join us, and let's build something amazing together!

hero.title: General Ownership
hero.subtitle: Document and Verify Ownership of Anything You Own
hero.description: Whether it's a cherished family heirloom, a valuable piece of equipment, or simply an item you want to keep track of, General Ownership Tagging with TagMyThing provides a simple, secure, and verifiable way to document your possessions. Create a digital record that proves ownership, tracks important details, and ensures your items are always identifiable.

features.title: Key Benefits
features.subtitle: Everything you need to document and protect your valuable possessions

proofOfOwnership.title: Proof of Ownership
proofOfOwnership.description: Create immutable, timestamped records that serve as verifiable proof of ownership for any item.

detailedDocumentation.title: Detailed Documentation
detailedDocumentation.description: Attach photos, videos, descriptions, and important documents (like receipts or certificates) to each tag.

lostAndFound.title: Lost & Found Recovery
lostAndFound.description: Increase the chances of recovering lost items by providing clear ownership information accessible to finders.

insuranceValuation.title: Insurance & Valuation
insuranceValuation.description: Maintain a comprehensive inventory of your valuables, simplifying insurance claims and appraisals.

bicycleRegistration.description: Tag your bicycle with its serial number, photos, and your contact information. If it's ever stolen and recovered, law enforcement can easily identify you as the rightful owner.

collectibles.title: Collectibles & Memorabilia
collectibles.description: Document your stamp collection, vintage comic books, or sports memorabilia with detailed photos, condition reports, and purchase receipts. This enhances their value and provides a clear record for future sales or inheritance.

homeInventory.title: Home Inventory
homeInventory.description: Create a digital inventory of valuable items in your home, such as electronics, jewelry, or artwork. In case of fire, theft, or natural disaster, you have a verifiable record for insurance purposes.

hero.subtitle: Unlock the Power of TagMyThing for Your Creative and Inventive Works
hero.description: Welcome to a new era of authenticity and protection for your creative masterpieces and innovative inventions. With TagMyThing, you can ensure that your work is securely tagged and easily verifiable.

benefits.title: Protect Your Creative Work
benefits.subtitle: Secure digital fingerprints for all your creative and inventive works

songwriters.title: For Songwriters and Musicians
songwriters.description: Tag lyrics, melodies, and recordings. Each tag creates a digital fingerprint to verify authorship.

inventors.title: For Inventors
inventors.description: Protect innovations by tagging specs and prototypes. Create a dated record confirming originality.

artists.title: For Artists & NFT Creators
artists.description: Give every piece a verified digital identity to protect it and increase marketplace trust.

qrCodes.description: Generate QR codes for physical items so anyone can quickly verify authenticity.

cta.description: Creators and innovators trust TagMyThing to protect and authenticate their most valuable work.

hero.title: Digital Legacy &
hero.subtitle: Secure Your Legacy for Future Generations
hero.description: Your possessions tell a story, and your intentions for them are deeply personal. MyWill/Legacy Tagging with TagMyThing allows you to create a living, verifiable record of your wishes for physical and digital assets, ensuring your legacy is preserved and your intentions are clearly understood by those you leave behind.
hero.extendedDescription: This is not just a place to leave your last will—it's a place to record your first will, and every intention in between.

benefits.title: Preserve What Matters Most
benefits.subtitle: Comprehensive digital legacy management for your most precious belongings

familyHeirlooms.description: Document and preserve the stories behind your family's most precious items.

digitalAssets.description: Secure access instructions for digital accounts, cryptocurrencies, and online assets.

importantDocuments.title: Important Documents
importantDocuments.description: Store and share critical documents like wills, insurance policies, and legal papers.

memories.title: Memories & Messages
memories.description: Leave personal messages, photos, and videos for your loved ones to discover.

examples.title: Legacy Examples
examples.subtitle: See how TagMyThing can preserve your intentions and memories

familyHeirlooms.title: Family Heirlooms
familyHeirlooms.description: Tag an antique watch with a video on its history and who should receive it, preserving story + intent.

digitalPhotos.title: Digital Photo Archives
digitalPhotos.description: Store where albums live and how to access/share them so memories aren't lost.

cryptocurrency.title: Cryptocurrency Wallets
cryptocurrency.description: Record wallet details and transfer instructions so digital wealth reaches beneficiaries.

hero.title: Business & Inventory
hero.subtitle: TagMyThing for Businesses: Simple, Secure Product Authentication with QR Codes
hero.description: TagMyThing offers a lightweight product verification system built for businesses. Each product is assigned a unique serial number and an automatically generated QR code. When customers scan the code, they can instantly verify the product's authenticity and view its scan history. This helps identify counterfeits through unusual scan patterns or locations, giving customers confidence and protecting your brand—all without complex cryptographic systems.

benefits.title: Enterprise-Grade Authentication
benefits.subtitle: Comprehensive product verification solutions for businesses of all sizes

antiFraud.title: Anti-Fraud Protection
antiFraud.description: Create tamper-proof digital certificates that customers can instantly verify.

brandTrust.title: Brand Trust & Reputation
brandTrust.description: Build customer confidence with transparent, verifiable product authenticity.

supplyChain.title: Supply Chain Transparency

customerExperience.title: Enhanced Customer Experience

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: A simple four-step process to secure your products against counterfeiting

whyChoose.title: Why Choose TagMyThing?
whyChoose.description: Our simple yet effective system assigns each product a unique serial number and QR code. When customers scan the code, they instantly see the product's verification page with its complete scan history. Unusual scan patterns—like multiple scans from different countries or suspicious frequency—help identify potential counterfeits. This transparency builds customer confidence while protecting your brand reputation.
whyChoose.cardDescription: Our lightweight QR code system provides effective protection through transparency and scan history tracking, scaling effortlessly with your business growth.

features: Simple QR code system requires no complex setup
Instant verification with complete scan history
Unusual patterns help identify potential counterfeits
